---
title: "README"
author: "Maria Cuellar"
date: "2026-02-17"
format: 
  gfm:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Testing

```{r load-data, echo=FALSE, include=FALSE}

library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyverse)
library(usmap)
library(readxl)

```
